faqs.question: Which companies generally recruit from Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE)?
faqs.answer: Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Grab India, Ess Kay Fincorp, Baywatch Resort Goa, Baru Biswal, Dr Cpr Life Sciences Pvt Ltd, Green Ripples Pvt Ltd, Grid Inddia Power Cable Pvt Ltd, Indusnet Techshu, Kasana Construction Company, National Residency, Techprolab It System Pvt Ltd, Moggley India Pvt Ltd, Emetsprings.

faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE)?
faqs.answer: Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) is a good institution for MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) are Infrastructure, Media Planning, Finance, HealthCare & Hospital.

faqs.question: Which courses does Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) offer?
faqs.answer: Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) provides programmes including MBA/PGDM in streams such as Business & Management Studies, Mass Communication & Media, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Infrastructure, Media Planning, Finance, HealthCare & Hospital.

placements.overview:
Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE), is located in Bhilai, Chhattisgarh. It is a private institute approved by AICTE. Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) provides 5 PG courses in 4 specialisations, namely Finance, HealthCare & Hospital, Infrastructure and Media Planning. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. MBA/PGDM is some of the courses offered at Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE). Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Business & Management Studies and Mass Communication & Media. The total fee at Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) ranges between INR 1,22,000 to 3,15,000. Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) has a student intake of 300 for all the courses. Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) offers various programmes at PG level. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Business & Management Studies and Mass Communication & Media. At the PG level, students can choose from courses, namely MBA/PGDM. The fees for Prism School of Business & Entrepreneurship (PSBE) courses range between INR 1,22,000 to 3,15,000.

college_info.college_name: Impact Institute of Management Studies: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The Karnataka PGCET 2026 exam for admission to the MBA and MCA courses will be held on May 14, 2026. For the ME/MTech course, the exam is scheduled for May 23, 2026.

placements.overview: Impact Institute of Management Studies is a private institute. It is located in Bangalore, Karnataka. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Impact Institute of Management Studies provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 7 courses across specialisation such as Finance. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, BCA, B.Com and BBA. Impact Institute of Management Studies fees ranges between INR 1,08,000 to 1,50,000. The student intake for these courses is 240. Impact Institute of Management Studies offers these course across fields such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. Impact Institute of Management Studies offers all the campus facilities to students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of management. Placements are not available in our college.

review_content.Placements: None of the students got internships from our college, and none of the students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered in our course is above 10 LPA, the lowest salary package offered is below 3 LPA and the average salary package offered is above 5 LPA. Multinational companies recruit students from this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library are available in our course. Infrastructure and facilities in our college are not bad. Quality of facilities in our hostel is bad, and mess and canteen food are also not bad. Medical facilities are not available here, and they don't conduct sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I suggest you not to take admission in this kind of college if you want a good career.

review_content.Placements: Placements and programmes are not conducted in Impact, and its primary concern is to earn money. Moreover, only a few teachers have the ability to teach and train students properly. Our college doesn't have a reputation, so none of the companies will visit here for placements. There are no placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is fine, but there are no air-conditioned rooms or no playground for students. It is one of the affordable colleges in Bangalore. But I suggest you not to take admission in this kind of college if you want a good career. It will ruin your life as well as career. I suggest you to join in good colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am completed dissatisfied with our college.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in our college, and the salary package offered is 4 LPA. Companies didn't visit our college for any purpose. Students get internships on their own efforts and not from the help of college. MBA is a very good and useful course if you pursue it in any good college which has good placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has poor infrastructure and poor hostel, and there is no hygienic canteen. Mainly, sports and activities are not promoted, and it doesn't organise the annual day, etc. The management needs only money from you, and they never care about you, etc. I blame only the management but not the faculty members and staff members.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It's not worth for the fees and the time we spend by being far from family.

review_content.Placements: No placements are held for us this time. They didn't care about placements. Still, they haven't informed us anything about placements. Though the reason is COVID, atleast they should take responsibility for it. They are not even concerned about the placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a good campus. The hostel is within the campus itself, and there is safety. There is also a canteen on the campus. But the food served should be improved in quality. There are no playgrounds for sports. For the MBA programme, infrastructure is good, and classrooms have projectors. We have a good auditorium.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I suggest not to opt this college for a good career.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the poorest colleges in Bangalore because the prime concern of the management is only students money. There are no placements and arts programmes. I recommend others to join in any other college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and college are very poor. They even didn't give any programmes to us. Our career is spoiled if we choose this college.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are always changing, and no one has proper knowledge. The only director named Mr Robort Utarid is a good man. He tries to mould students' career. Rest all of them are not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: We are having a hope to get placements to all of our batch.

review_content.Placements: There is a chance of placements in the college, but not sure about that because our batch is the first batch, so we should wait until our second year starts. The principal is the newcomer and has a lot of talent, so depending on him, the placements will be available.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college had okay facilities, and they are trying to improve it as I already said that our principal is new to our college and he is trying a lot to improve the infrastructure facilities to the college and also to the students to ensure the availability of the infrastructures.

paragraphs: Impact Institute of Management Studies admissions are entrance-based. Candidates must appear for certain entrance exams to take admission. The college offers a variety of courses to the candidates at the UG and PG level in the field of Business and Management Studies, IT and Software and Accounting and Commerce. Read below for more details on Impact Institute of Management Studies admission process:

courses_data.name: Impact Institute of Management Studies MBA/PGDM Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Impact Institute of Management Studiesoffers MBA/PGDM for 2 years at the PG level. This course is offered in full time mode. Candidates are offered admission in MBA/PGDM based on their qualifying exam scores. The university offers MBA/PGDM in specialisations such as Finance, etc. Selected candidates have to pay a total tuition fees ofINR 1,08,000 - 1,16,940. Check below the Impact Institute of Management Studies eligibility criteria for MBA/PGDM: Eligibility Criteria

courses_data.name: Impact Institute of Management Studies BCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Impact Institute of Management Studiesoffers a 3 years BCA programme at the UG level. The course is divided into 6 semesters. Aspirants are offered admission based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. Check below the eligibility criteria for BCA:

courses_data.description: Impact Institute of Management Studiesoffers a 3 years BBA course at the UG level. The institute offers BBA in full time mode. Admission to BBA course is based on scores of the aspirants in CBSE 12th and Karnataka 2nd PUC. There are a total of 80 seats in the BBA programme. Check below the eligibility criteria for BBA:

description: Impact Institute of Management Studies cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Impact Institute of Management Studies Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 13957 in the General AI category.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Impact Institute of Management Studies. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 13957 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 33998, while in 2023, it was 43490.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

college_info.college_name: ILAM - Jaipur National University, Jaipur

highlights.summary:
Admissions 2023 are open to all the courses. Candidates can apply for the respective courses through the official website.

Institute of Logistics and Aviation Management, Jaipur (ILAM Jaipur) is one of the six chain institutes functioning under ILAM. Other campuses of ILAM are located in Bengaluru, Dehradun, Delhi, Mumbai and Pune. ILAM has an alumni network of over 17,000 students who are working across the globe with more than 2,500 industry partners. ILAM Jaipur is affiliated to Jaipur National University and is recognised under Section 3 of the UGC Act 1956. Currently, the institute offers full-time courses at UG and PG level across the streams of Business & Management Studies, Aviation, Hospitality & Travel, etc. Also, ILAM Jaipur offers residential BBA and MBA programmes in Logistics & Aviation. The institute has four schools functioning under its name:

The institute is spread across 120 acre with modern infrastructural facilities. It includes spacious classrooms, a library, an auditorium, computing facilities, Wi-Fi, hostels, etc. ILAM Jaipur draws from a pool of top-notch faculty comprising eminent academicians and professionals with extensive experience in Aviation, Logistics and related industries. These faculty members have up to 20 years of experience and most of them are PhD holders.

ILAM Jaipur maintains a balance between theory and practical training. Industry-interface enables students to analyse and understand the changing dynamics of the industry. The institute has strong industry tie-ups that helps it to conduct industrial visits, guest lectures, seminars, conferences, workshops, etc., for the students. Frequent training sessions are organised for the students to keep them updated with the changing trends of Logistics, Aviation, Banking and Automobile industries.

The major highlights of the institute are tabulated below:

The institute conducts an in-house entrance test for granting admission to most of the courses. A detailed overview of ILAM Jaipur admission process is given below:

For MBA admission, the institute accepts CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ GMAT scores of eligible candidates. Shortlisted applicants are further called for a written exam and Personal Interview (PI) round.

Read more: ILAM Jaipur Admission Process

ILAM Jaipur offers BBA, BSc, BTech at UG level and MBA, MSc programmes at the PG level in various specialisations. The duration of BBA and BSc programmes is three years, whereas BTech has a course duration of four years. MBA and MCA programmes are for two years. Below mentioned are the details regarding ILAM Jaipur courses and eligibility criteria:

Read more: ILAM Jaipur Courses and Fees

ILAM Jaipur has a placement cell that invites companies to the campus for the final placements. It also coordinates the entire placement process and facilitates corporate training and internships. All the students at ILAM Jaipur receive an average CTC of Rs 3-6 LPA as they are trained to lead the industry. It is mandatory for all the students of the PG programme to undergo a six-month internship at the end of the final year, which ensures practical exposure and industry interface. Apart from this, ILAM Jaipur provides three weeks of intensive Pre-Placement Preparation (PPP) to all its students which further helps in interview preparation, personality enhancement, etc. Some of the major sector-wise roles and job opportunities offered to the graduates of ILAM Jaipur are listed below:

The institute offers placements in several domains, including Logistics, Aviation, Retails, Banking, Fashion, Automobile, Graphic and Interior Design. Some of the prominent recruiters from popular domains of ILAM Jaipur are listed below:

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a really good infrastructure, along with great staff members.

review_content.Placements: About 64% of the students from our course got placed. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month, and the highest salary offered is Rs. 32,000 per month. Wipro, Randstad, TCS and Tech Mahindra are the top recruiters for our course. Top roles offered in our course are BPO, marketing executives and US IT recruiter. The highest salary package offered in our course is 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.8 LPA. Only 10%-30% of the students got internships in Wipro, Tech Mahindra, TCS, etc., from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has computer labs, a library, well-experienced staff members, good surroundings and high-quality equipment. Good food is served here, and medical facilities are also provided. Indoor games like carrom, chess and board games and also outdoor sports like cricket, basketball, tennis, hockey, etc., are conducted here.

faqs.answer: Although 88% on the GPAT is a good score, entrance to Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University's MBA programme may not be assured with that score alone. Less emphasis is given on GPAT in the MBA programme at DPSRU, which clearly employs the Delhi Pharma Entrance Test (DPET) result.Your application may be strengthened by a high GPAT score, but it won't be the main deciding factor in your selection.The number of applications, DPET exam difficulty, and available seats are some of the elements that determine the minimum cutoff scores for admission. Should the competition change, an 88% GPAT might be adequate this year, even though it wasn't in past years. Go to the DPSRU website and look for the official MBA cutoff scores from the prior year.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get Delhi Pharmaceutical Sciences and Research University, MBA with 88% in GPAT?

faqs.answer: You must have graduated from an accredited university with a bachelor's degree in management, science, or pharmacy with at least 55% of the total possible points.If you have a valid DPET or CAT score, you will be assigned a weight. Applicants who will be sitting for their final degree exams may also apply, but they must send in their final grade report by the deadline for admission. The programme has no upper age limit for applications.You will have to go through a multi-stage selection process that usually consists of entrance exams, group discussions, and in-person interviews after you complete the eligibility requirements. Online applications must be submitted via the official DPSRU website for all MBA programmes.Normally, the application window is available from January to March.

college_info.intro: Bangalore Clinical Research Institute courses include BSc, MBA and MSc as some of the popular programmes offered in full-time mode. The Institute offers these courses for the duration of 2 years to 3 years with a tuition fees ranging from INR 1.05 Lakh to INR 5 Lakh. ICRI Bangalore admissions can be availed by qualifying entrance exams and securing valid scores in the same. For more details around ICRI Bangalore popular programmes, check out the table below:

placements.overview: The Institute has not yet updated 2024 placement stats. However, the same will be reflected here once out. ICRI placements of all the eight campuses are conducted centrally by the authorities of Institute of Clinical Research of India. Placements are conducted through campus recruitment process. The recruiting companies follow the standard selection procedure for campus placements. ICRI Bangalore offers an impressive 100 per cent placement record in various streams such as Clinical Research, Healthcare and Pharmacovigilance and offers high ROI. Major industries and top recruiters included:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, ICRI Bangalore - Institute of Clinical Research India Bangalore offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time and Part Time courses, from streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.Sc., BBA and UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The ICRI Bangalore - Institute of Clinical Research India Bangalore course fee ranges between INR 30,000 to 5,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Oct -2022) Executive M.Sc. in Clinical Research - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am not at all satisfied with the institute and course curriculum.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not very great here. Many of the students were not placed, but only a few students got placed. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. There was no placement cell. All the students get internships but after a lot of hard work. I wouldn't rely on the placements of ICRI for jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was average. They assure that they provide books in the beginning, but they didn't provide. Later on, they provided, but it was too late. There was no canteen, which makes difficult for daily meals. Classrooms were okay here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Oct -2022) Masters in Management Studies - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Best Infrastructure & Placement in ICRI.

review_content.Placements: The placements in our batch were quite good, much better than the previous year's placing record. The companies that come for recruitment change from year to year depending on their recruiting needs, but rest assured that if you have a strong track record of performance and are a diligent worker, you'll be put where you want to be, whether it's an MNC or a burgeoning start-up. HCL, Johnson & Johnson, Cognizant technology, Accenture, Novartis Healthcare, Pfizer, Quintiles, and others were among the regular recruiters.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is accessible across the campus. There are no restrictions on how much you can use it. All of the classrooms have projectors and are fully air-conditioned. The library includes books of all kinds, with a varied rental period for different classes of students. Almost all of the main journals and databases are accessible through the library's online portal.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct -2022) Executive M.Sc. in Clinical Research - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am not at all satisfied with the institute and course curriculum.

content.Placements: Placements are not very great here. Many of the students were not placed, but only a few students got placed. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. There was no placement cell. All the students get internships but after a lot of hard work. I wouldn't rely on the placements of ICRI for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was average. They assure that they provide books in the beginning, but they didn't provide. Later on, they provided, but it was too late. There was no canteen, which makes difficult for daily meals. Classrooms were okay here.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct -2022) Masters in Management Studies - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Best Infrastructure & Placement in ICRI.

content.Placements: The placements in our batch were quite good, much better than the previous year's placing record. The companies that come for recruitment change from year to year depending on their recruiting needs, but rest assured that if you have a strong track record of performance and are a diligent worker, you'll be put where you want to be, whether it's an MNC or a burgeoning start-up. HCL, Johnson & Johnson, Cognizant technology, Accenture, Novartis Healthcare, Pfizer, Quintiles, and others were among the regular recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is accessible across the campus. There are no restrictions on how much you can use it. All of the classrooms have projectors and are fully air-conditioned. The library includes books of all kinds, with a varied rental period for different classes of students. Almost all of the main journals and databases are accessible through the library's online portal.

placement_data.title: ICRI Bangalore - Institute of Clinical Research India Bangalore Placement overview
paragraphs: ICRI Bangalore boasts of 100% placements offered to its students in various streams such as Clinical Research, Healthcare and Pharmacovigilance . ICRI placements of all the eight campuses are conducted centrally by the authorities of Institute of Clinical Research of India.

The institute offers students with plenty of employment opportunities and career prospects. It offers ample amount of industry exposure to enhance the students' employability. It has an impressive placement record and offers high ROI.

The institute conducts placement sessions and recruitment drives at the end of every year. Over the years, numerous ICRI students have secured high-paying jobs in clinical research, healthcare, logistics, retail, air freight, manufacturing, cargo freight, pharma, banking, automobile and aviation industries.
Various companies are invited to ICRI campus by the active placement cell. Here is the step-by-step process of placements at ICRI:
Q. How are the placements at ICRI? What is their recruitment process?
A. ICRI has a 100% placement record. Placements are conducted through campus recruitment process. The recruiting companies for campus placements follow the standard selection procedure.
Q. What is the placement process of ICRI Bangalore?

A. The college has an active placement cell which handles all the placement related tasks. Various companies are invited to the pre-placement talk on the assigned date. Test/ Group Discussion is conducted by the company followed by a personal interview of the shortlisted students. Results are declared within 2-3 days from the interview.
Q. Who are the major recruiters of ICRI?
Q. Does ICRI offer internships to its students?

A. Yes, companies offer internship /industrial training to its students. Industrial Visits / Seminars / Conferences / Guest Lectures are also conducted by the institute to give students insights about the various activities involved in the industries.

The institute offers students with plenty of employment opportunities and career prospects. It offers ample amount of industry exposure to enhance the students' employability. It has an impressive placement record and offers high ROI.
The institute conducts placement sessions and recruitment drives at the end of every year. Over the years, numerous ICRI students have secured high-paying jobs in clinical research, healthcare, logistics, retail, air freight, manufacturing, cargo freight, pharma, banking, automobile and aviation industries.
ICRI Bangalore Placement Process 2020
Various companies are invited to ICRI campus by the active placement cell. Here is the step-by-step process of placements at ICRI:
Companies are given an option to go to any one of the eight campuses for recruitment of students
Companies are assigned a convenient date to follow-up for negotiation
After confirmation provided by the company, a pre-placement talk is arranged on the date with ICRI authorities
After that, companies conduct a test and/or Group Discussion (GD) to shortlist the interested candidates
Shortlisted candidates are then interviewed for final selection by the company
Result of the final selection is usually announced on the day of interview or within 2-3 days
ICRI Bangalore Top Companies 2020
Important FAQs regarding ICRI Bangalore Placements
Q. How are the placements at ICRI? What is their recruitment process?
A. ICRI has a 100% placement record. Placements are conducted through campus recruitment process. The recruiting companies for campus placements follow the standard selection procedure.
Q. What is the placement process of ICRI Bangalore?
A. The college has an active placement cell which handles all the placement related tasks. Various companies are invited to the pre-placement talk on the assigned date. Test/ Group Discussion is conducted by the company followed by a personal interview of the shortlisted students. Results are declared within 2-3 days from the interview.
Q. Who are the major recruiters of ICRI?
A. List of major recruiters that visit ICRI Bangalore for recruitment are mentioned below:
Clinical Research & Healthcare Management:
Bioxcel, Cipla, Max Healthcare, Apollo, Fortis, etc.
Pharmacovigilance & Clinical Data Management:
Accenture, Allergan Medical, Cognizant, Genpact, etc.
Logistics:
Tata, Ashok Leyland, DHL, DTDC, FedEx, etc.
Aviation:
British Airways, GAAR, IndiGo, Lufthansa, etc.
Automobile:
Jaguar, BMW, Renault, Audi, etc.
Banking and Finance:
ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, SBI bank, etc.
Fashion:
H&M, Fabindia, Levi’s, ZARA, etc.
Q. Does ICRI offer internships to its students?
A. Yes, companies offer internship /industrial training to its students. Industrial Visits / Seminars / Conferences / Guest Lectures are also conducted by the institute to give students insights about the various activities involved in the industries.

reviews_list.review_title: My lovely college Millennium Group of Institution.

review_content.Placements: From the 5th semester, students are eligible for campus placements. Various companies visited the college for placements. Most companies offer a salary package that ranges from 2.5-6 LPA. The highest salary package offered in the college was 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Mostly, 65% of students get placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and all facilities are provided for staff members and students. Cleanliness is given first priority in this institute. The institute library is good for studies. Classrooms are also well-furnished and large. A projector is also available for video lectures.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied due to the environment and good faculty.

review_content.Placements: In this college, 70% of students get placed, and the lowest package is 2 LPA, while the highest package is 6-6.5 LPA, with an average of around 4 LPA. In this course, you can get opportunities in your future, such as becoming a DI. Companies like Cipla and Sunflower are involved in the placement process.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good and helpful to students, whether they are first-year or last-year students. There are different facilities present for different subjects, and there are 4-5 labs for various subjects, such as a chemistry lab and a pharmaceutics lab. There are three libraries: two in pharmacy and one in engineering. In MGI, there is a hospital with a medicine room and beds for patients. There are no girls' or boys' hostels on campus. The canteen is also in good condition, providing milk, cold drinks, and other food items. There is a basketball ground on the campus.

overview_faqs.question: Is Millennium Group of Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Millennium Group of Institutions is a reputed institute for B.Tech, UG Diploma, After 1th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Pharma, M.Pharma, D.Pharma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Architecture & Planning, IT & Software, Aviation, Business & Management Studies, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Millennium Group of Institutions has a review rating of 3.2 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.1 on campuslife, 2.8 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 3.5 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: Millennium Group of Institution Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Civil Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college is good and affordable.

content.Placements: I do not know very much about placements. I have seen some portfolios of pass-out students who got placements in Millennium Company. Strata Geosystems Company visited the college for placements last year in May with the package range from 2.5-3 LPA. Other companies also visit the college, but I do not know their names.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is beautiful. The location of the college is not good but still average. Wi-Fi is not available in college. The library is available there but I never visited there. The hostel is good and the food of the hostel is good. The management is also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Because of faculty, good placement in 2015, really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Colleges often claim that more than 90% of their students are placed in courses. However, the graduation rate for students varies by institution and by gender. For example, top recruiting companies are: 1. Macleods, 2. Marksans, 3. Cipla. There is a 6-month internship from your course and others.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for a course department may include classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and Wi-Fi. These facilities support the teaching and learning process. The quality of the facilities in your hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Machine Design - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: My lovely college Millennium Group of Institution.

content.Placements: From the 5th semester, students are eligible for campus placements. Various companies visited the college for placements. Most companies offer a salary package that ranges from 2.5-6 LPA. The highest salary package offered in the college was 15 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2.5 LPA. Mostly, 65% of students get placement.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and all facilities are provided for staff members and students. Cleanliness is given first priority in this institute. The institute library is good for studies. Classrooms are also well-furnished and large. A projector is also available for video lectures.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied due to the environment and good faculty.

content.Placements: In this college, 70% of students get placed, and the lowest package is 2 LPA, while the highest package is 6-6.5 LPA, with an average of around 4 LPA. In this course, you can get opportunities in your future, such as becoming a DI. Companies like Cipla and Sunflower are involved in the placement process.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are very good and helpful to students, whether they are first-year or last-year students. There are different facilities present for different subjects, and there are 4-5 labs for various subjects, such as a chemistry lab and a pharmaceutics lab. There are three libraries: two in pharmacy and one in engineering. In MGI, there is a hospital with a medicine room and beds for patients. There are no girls' or boys' hostels on campus. The canteen is also in good condition, providing milk, cold drinks, and other food items. There is a basketball ground on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Lateral entry B. Tech students' fee is only 15,000 per year; that's good. Self-study is required.

content.Placements: Here, placement fees are 5000, and the placement companies are not coming; even 1-3 minor companies come, and the college is not ready for the placement. Even teachers are not excited about getting placements. Passed-out students are giving very negative feedback to new students who really want to study.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good; new buildings are created, and there is good space to study. The new labs are there, but teachers are not interested in teaching. Wi-Fi is available with good speed, and bus facilities are also available. Security guards are good and very strict.

admission_process.title: Millennium Group of Institution Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Millennium Group of Institution admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Millennium Group of Institutionoffers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of the courses include B.Ed, GNM, MBA/PGDM and M.Ed. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 38,000 - 1,65,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 42 months - 2 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

faqs.answer:
Millennium Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed diploma in Engineering from a recognized board.
or

description: Millennium Group of Institution cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 855470 and 958405 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 855470, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 855470.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the Millennium Group of Institution B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top two most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning and B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 855470 and 958405, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for middle class family as the fee is not high.
reviews.review_text: The college was built on 60 acres of land. The college had full of green environment campus. It provided Wi-Fi to students. The lab of our college was fully managed with required equipment. The condition of the classroom was good for students. Our college also provided a library to students for self-study in eco-friendly environment. Our college didn't provide a hostel facility.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you stay away from this college.
reviews.review_text: I suggest you do not use the hostel. Bad quality food is served in the canteen. Lab instruments are in very bad condition. Bus service is available with a scrapped bus. I suggest you just stay away from this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied from our college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fully furnished and the library is full of books. The quality of food served in the canteen is good and hygienic for us. Our college provides medical facilities as well as an ambulance. They also encourage students in playing games and help them to grow.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to have a bright future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, and the teaching environment was excellent. The labs and classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel was great with all amenities, like gym, study room etc. The quality of food was very good. The hostel rooms are fully furnished, neat and clean. The warden was like our guardian, and he cares for students like his own children.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, placement, and the environment of the campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure in Bhopal. The college also provides good canteen facility to the students. The college has good campus and games facilities like a volleyball court, cricket ground, etc. Water and electricity supply is very good in college. Wi-Fi facility with good speed is available. Our Science lab is big and fully equipped with advanced technology.

reviews.review_heading: Very much satisfied by them it's looks like our family.
reviews.review_text: The college provudes free Wi-Fi to all the students and teachers and the classroom of this college are very NEET and clean the labs of this college are soo good and they explain all the practical very good and they also provides games facility medical facilities and from library's we can easily issue any book.

reviews.review_heading: A review on Millennium Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is only a myth in the college. It works when government organises any online examination. Labs are the very bad in all the branches of engineering. The condition of classrooms is good. The medical facility is a good part of the college. The college neglects you even if you are good at any sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good college because of helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not provided to the overall campus or classrooms. Classrooms are well maintained equipped with CCCTV. Library is not so good, we are not allowed to sit or issue any book there unless there is a period of library. If you fall ill they provide only medicines. Sport and Games facilities are provided there. Varieties of foods are provided in the canteen like samosa, kachori, Paratha, Petties, Tea, cold drink. No I did not face any infrastructure issue.

reviews.review_heading: You will ruin your college life once you got admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, the lab is mere of the name, classrooms are satisfactory, useless library, faculty members are under qualified. There is no educational environment. This college has very much financial disputes between the higher authorities. You will find too many difficulties in this college.

overview_faqs.question: Is MBA available at Gandhi Institute of Management and Technology (GIMT)?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is offered at a full-time course at Gandhi Institute of Management and Technology (GIMT). The duration of the course is two years. The PG-level course is offered in affiliation with MAKAUT. Students get an MBA degree from MAKAUT on completion of the programme. For more information, aspirants can visit the official GIMT website and fill out the available enquiry form.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Sc in Nursing available at GIMT?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, a full-time BSc in Nursing course is available at Gandhi Institute of Management and Technology (GIMT). The duration of the course is four years. The UG-level course is recognised by the Indian Nursing Council. This course is suitable for candidates who have completed Class 12 with PCB subjects and want to serve as nurses, midwives, medical assistants in the healthcare sector. For more information, aspirants can visit the official GIMT website and fill out the available enquiry form.

admission_process.title: Gandhi Institute of Management and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Formerly known as Gandhi Academy of Management Studies, this institute came into being in 2000. Currently, it is known as Gandhi Institute of Management and Technology. It is located at Salt Lake City, Kolkata and is a UGC-approved institute.GMIT Kolkataoffers courses in affiliation withMAKAUT,Singhania University, Bharat Sebak Samaj and Nieusbud.

GIMT admission process is both entrance and merit-based. All students get admission here on the basis of their academic score and there is no management quota here. GMIT Kolkata offers four management courses. The upper age limit to apply is 35 years for GNM and BSc Nursing. Check below the eligibility and selection criteria for top GIMT courses:
Know more aboutGandhi Institute of Management and Technology courses.
Note: The information is collated from various sources and hence, is indicative.
GIMTadmission processinvolves several steps. Check below step-wise admission process:
1: GIMT Application Process

Candidates must first register to apply for the preferred course. Once registered, aspirants have fill out the application form duly by selecting the desired course and providing the specified details.
2:Selection Process
The institute shortlists students based on their or entrance exam scores.
3: Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted candidates must pay the course fee and go through the counselling (if specified) to confirm their admission at GIMT.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NBS - Naipunnya Business School offers a wide range of programmes at PG level. faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by NBS - Naipunnya Business School is up to 60. Good thing to know is that NBS - Naipunnya Business School has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How much is the intake across all courses being offerred at NBS - Naipunnya Business School?

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is the best college for the MBA course.

review_content.Placements: Some top recruiting companies for our course are BSNL, MTNL, ONGC, etc. It offers internships that help students understand the corporate world. I am in my second year and have already completed an internship with a company. Top roles offered are startup founder, financial analyst, etc. About 80-85% of students got placed in many top companies. The minimum package is 2.5 LPA, and the maximum package is 15.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: They provide us with hygienic hostels for both girls and boys. The food at our canteen is excellent. I adore it. Wi-Fi, labs, classes, a library, a gym, a sports club, a playground, and other amenities are all highly intriguing and fulfilling. It gives us access to medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is best for MBA course.

review_content.Placements: About 70–75% of students are getting placed in many top companies. The minimum package is 3 LPA, and the maximum is 16 LPA. BSNL, MTNL, ONGC, etc., are among the top recruiting companies. They offer internships that help students understand the corporate world. I am currently in my second year and have already completed an internship with a company. The top roles are Startup Founder, Financial Analyst, and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is great. The library is small but has more educational books than novels or other interesting books. The food at the hostel is really good, and no complaints are heard from anyone staying at the hotel. The hospital facilities are great. The canteen is not very good, but it serves enough main dishes and a few drinks. The college research labs are good, and classrooms are excellent.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is the best college for the MBA course.

content.Placements: Some top recruiting companies for our course are BSNL, MTNL, ONGC, etc. It offers internships that help students understand the corporate world. I am in my second year and have already completed an internship with a company. Top roles offered are startup founder, financial analyst, etc. About 80-85% of students got placed in many top companies. The minimum package is 2.5 LPA, and the maximum package is 15.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: They provide us with hygienic hostels for both girls and boys. The food at our canteen is excellent. I adore it. Wi-Fi, labs, classes, a library, a gym, a sports club, a playground, and other amenities are all highly intriguing and fulfilling. It gives us access to medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is best for MBA course.

content.Placements: About 70–75% of students are getting placed in many top companies. The minimum package is 3 LPA, and the maximum is 16 LPA. BSNL, MTNL, ONGC, etc., are among the top recruiting companies. They offer internships that help students understand the corporate world. I am currently in my second year and have already completed an internship with a company. The top roles are Startup Founder, Financial Analyst, and more.
content.Infrastructure: The college is great. The library is small but has more educational books than novels or other interesting books. The food at the hostel is really good, and no complaints are heard from anyone staying at the hotel. The hospital facilities are great. The canteen is not very good, but it serves enough main dishes and a few drinks. The college research labs are good, and classrooms are excellent.

individual_reviews.title: There are really good staff members, and they are very helpful. The campus is also very good.

content.Placements: Staff members are also good here. Companies like Tata, Mahindra, etc., offer placements to students here. Branded companies visit here for campus selection. I had an impressive experience here.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Every student can access and use the internet for study purposes. Every staff member can also use the Wi-Fi for their use. Labs are available for every course department. The hostel mess is also available in which good quality food is served.
content.Faculty: Students passed with A grade from their course. About 50% of students have passed with a B grade. There are quite good academic results in our college. Teachers here are very helpful. They clear every doubt of the students. They not only help in the study but also help students in their personal problems like fees payment, etc. There is good quality teaching due to experienced teachers. Semester exams are not difficult if students attend classes regularly.

More than 29% of the students got internships.

reviews_list.review_title: My college experience as I say.

review_content.Placements: Around 20% students were placed, as they had the capability and were meeting the industry standard. The highest package was 12 Lacs pa, the lowest package was 3 Lacs pa, and Average was 5 Lacs pa. Top recruiting company was delloite. 25-30% students got internship in Top CA firms all around India.
review_content.Infrastructure: Basic Infrastructure facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library are available in the college. This college had a breathtaking view. Other facilities for sports were also available inside the college. Hostel room was good and food was also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Gyanveer College.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students got placed from the biotechnology course. Top recruiting companies of our college are Genetic, Sisco Research Lab, Serum Institute of India and Dr Reddy. In our course, the lowest salary package offered is 1.5 to 3 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 8 to 10 LPA. Almost 60% of the students got an internship from a biotechnology course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good and well-equipped library with ample amount of books. Wi-Fi is also available in the whole campus. Food served is of good quality in the canteen. Some food is not good, and the quality is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Really good teacher and classroom.

review_content.Placements: 90 percent of students get placed in the course. The highest package was 15 LPA, and the lowest was 7 LPA. At least 50 percent of students got internships from my course, and the top roles offered are accountant, assistant accountant, finance officer, cashier, receptionist, and many more.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: My college experience as I say.

content.Placements: Around 20% students were placed, as they had the capability and were meeting the industry standard. The highest package was 12 Lacs pa, the lowest package was 3 Lacs pa, and Average was 5 Lacs pa. Top recruiting company was delloite. 25-30% students got internship in Top CA firms all around India.
content.Infrastructure: Basic Infrastructure facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, and library are available in the college. This college had a breathtaking view. Other facilities for sports were also available inside the college. Hostel room was good and food was also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of Gyanveer College.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of the students got placed from the biotechnology course. Top recruiting companies of our college are Genetic, Sisco Research Lab, Serum Institute of India and Dr Reddy. In our course, the lowest salary package offered is 1.5 to 3 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 8 to 10 LPA. Almost 60% of the students got an internship from a biotechnology course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good and well-equipped library with ample amount of books. Wi-Fi is also available in the whole campus. Food served is of good quality in the canteen. Some food is not good, and the quality is average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good teacher and classroom.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students get placed in the course. The highest package was 15 LPA, and the lowest was 7 LPA. content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. They have a library, free Wi-Fi, very big classrooms, and computer labs. They provide very good food in the canteen. The library is very spacious, and the Wi-Fi also functions very well. They have very good sports facilities and a sports ground.

Indian School of Public Policy (ISPP) popular programmes are the PG programme in Public Policy, Design and Management and the LokNeeti programme which is a Certificate programme in Policy, Data & Behaviour Change for working professionals. These programmes offer an in-depth understanding of public policy and also equip students with management and designing understanding so as to develop better policy executives and systems thinkers. With the help of the LokNeeti programmes, students will be able to achieve the following things:
There are various interactive labs available for students such as Writing and Communication Labs, Policy Praxis Lab (PPL), and others. Candidates must be aware of their Indian School of Public Policy (ISPP) eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. At the PG level, the college offers a one-year full-time PG programme in Public Policy, Design & Management. The college also provides a four-month certificate programme in Policy, Data & Behaviour Change for working professionals. This is a part-time hybrid course provided by the college. There is no minimum age limit fixed for applying for the LokNeeti programme. Also, work experience is not necessary for admission to this course. review_summary.college_name: Dayanand Anglo Vedic Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College Review of DAVIET Jalandhar by a 1st Year Student.

content.Placements: The majority of the students were placed from the college, with the highest package of about 70 LPA. Companies like Wipro, Microsoft, L&T, and many others. In college, each student is made industry-ready, and proper training is given so that each and every student gets a better placement.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are great, and the infrastructure is not the best, but it's great. Wi-Fi doesn't work that well. Besides the library is amazing. It has plenty of study material, including books, notes, test papers, newsletters, and many more. Overall, it's great.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Value For Money College with good faculty and infrastructure.

content.Placements: In our third year, many companies visited our campus for pre-placement offers. About 95% of my batchmates cleared the aptitude test, for which our professors provided extra classes. Unfortunately, many failed in the last round, so only 40-50% of my classmates were actually placed. Luckily, I was one of them. The highest package was 74 lacs, secured by my senior, and the lowest was 3 lacs. The average was 5-6 lacs. The top recruiters were Infosys and ST Microelectronics.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good modern infrastructure, including well-ventilated classrooms and labs with ample PCs and air conditioning. The library is centrally organized and has electronic access as well. The library had many books for static GK and current affairs. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Classrooms are equipped with smartboards and ample charging sockets for laptops and phones. There is an international-level football ground, two basketball courts, and great campus nightlife. The canteen is not that great, but other cheaper and better options are available near the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: DAVIET College review for B.Teach CSE.

content.Placements: Placements are good. Decent students easily get placed. The highest salary package offered in our college is about 70 LPA, and the average salary package offered ranges from 5 LPA - 10 LPA. Internships and training provided in our college are good.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is entirely Wi-Fi operated. So students can easily connect to Wi-Fi anywhere in the college. Classrooms may vary from course to course. Some classrooms are better, and some are not so good. Our college has 2 floors for the library and it is very well managed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, good performance and management .

content.Placements: More than 90% of students are placed every year in reputed companies; the highest package is 15 LPA for freshers, and the average package is 4–7 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, GreyB, etc. 100% of students got internships. The top roles offered in my course are web development and software engineering .
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs, and library management and infrastructure are very good. There is also the availability of Wi-Fi. Classrooms are spacious and in labs there is huge availability of computers. Hostels are also in good condition, and the food provided by the mess is good. My college also has medical facilities; there is a canteen and a sandwich shop in my college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Mediocre college with decent placements.

content.Placements: The placement trend in CSE department is approximately 70-80% students getting placed every year in majority tier 3 companies based in Mohali. Average package this has been 7-8 LPA. A student even got a package of 70 LPA in a USA based company. Mole roles offered are of Software Development Engineer (SDE). Minimum package is around 4 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-equipped with projector screens and sound system in each class. Wi-Fi facility is in the entire campus. The library is the best thing in this college, with good interior, every type of books available and also an e-learning section available. Canteen food is good. Hostel has AC and non-AC rooms, Wi-Fi, medical facility at any time of the day, and a gym as well.

paragraphs: Dayanand Anglo Vedic Institute of Engineering and Technology admissionsare completely merit-based. The institute offers 27 programmes.Dayanand Anglo Vedic Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through its official website. Dayanand Anglo Vedic Institute of Engineering and Technology admission is done based on scores of exams like GATE, CMAT, and CBSE 12th. The university offers over 27 courses at UG and PG levels in field, such as Engineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Hospitality and Travel, Banking and Finance and Insurance. Read more details around Dayanand Anglo Vedic Institute of Engineering and Technology admission in the following article.
At UG and PG level, BHMCT, BHMTT, MBA/PGDM, etc. are among the top courses offered at Dayanand Anglo Vedic Institute of Engineering and Technology.

reviews.review_text: Our college is entirely Wi-Fi operated. So students can easily connect to Wi-Fi anywhere in the college. Classrooms may vary from course to course. Some classrooms are better, and some are not so good. Our college has 2 floors for the library and it is very well managed.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good performance and management .
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs, and library management and infrastructure are very good. There is also the availability of Wi-Fi. Classrooms are spacious and in labs there is huge availability of computers. Hostels are also in good condition, and the food provided by the mess is good. My college also has medical facilities; there is a canteen and a sandwich shop in my college.

reviews.review_heading: Mediocre college with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well-equipped with projector screens and sound system in each class. Wi-Fi facility is in the entire campus. The library is the best thing in this college, with good interior, every type of books available and also an e-learning section available. Canteen food is good. Hostel has AC and non-AC rooms, Wi-Fi, medical facility at any time of the day, and a gym as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with many students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in every block. Labs and classrooms are average. The library has old edition books. I am a day scholar so can't say about the hostel. Some students like the food served in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is average college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is fine. There is Wi-Fi but the speed is low. There is a monthly limit for the students using the internet. Some classrooms have air-conditioners and some don't. Quality of food in the hostel is good. There are sports activities and many students won the gold medal in inter-university competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Good college experience and better infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course department is good, and the facilities provided in our hostel are good. Food quality is on average, and the canteen is very good. Sports grounds are vast, and all games indoor-outdoor are available.  The mess food is served 4times a day.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest you don't choose a college based on its reputation and choose based on its experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available for every course/department is good. Every student has Wi-Fi Id to access the internet with a 30 GB monthly limit. Labs are also in good condition, and all the classrooms are spacious and airy. Some classrooms even have air-conditioners. The library of the college is beautifully built and maintained. You will surely love it. The canteen is also available here, and the menu and quality of food depend on the contract. During my tenure, it was fabulous, and the food ite...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placement and study rest is all good.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is very good, library are fully AC. 
Wi-Fi is provided, classroom are quite spacious. 
Canteen & medical services are available. 
Sports facilities are average. Ground is small. 
But for cricket practice there are nets. And even you can do long jump in pit.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good like Wi-Fi, cricket and many games. All classrooms are very clean, and hostel rooms are also good. The quality of food is good, and medical facilities are available, so the infrastructure is good. In this college, a fresher party is conducted from time to time, and they also invite actors and actresses, which is awesome. The canteen is good, and canteen food quality is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good like Wi-Fi, cricket and many games. All classrooms are very clean. Hostel rooms are good. They give food, and the quality of food is good. Medical facilities are available, so the infrastructure is good. In this college, a fresher party is conducted from time to time, and they also invite actors and actresses, so it is awesome. The canteen is good, and canteen food quality is also good.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good, and some of them have AC. Wi-Fi is free for students. Labs are equipped with all the required equipment. The library has a great collection of books for every branch and every year. The hostel is good, and the food quality is sometimes the best and sometimes the worst.

reviews.review_heading: It can improve in sports, placement opportunities, canteen etc.
reviews.review_text: Everything on the campus is made 10-12 years before. So they require a bit improvement. The food served in the canteen is average. There is no variety, and even the quality is not up to the mark though. They are improving it each year but maybe by the time I pass from college they may improve. Sports facilities should be open to all, and regular coaching should be provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of DAV Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi facility in our college. Every student is provided with their own unique Id by our college to access Wi-Fi facility. The library is well-equipped with books, and the latest edition books are also available in our library. Medical facilities are also available in our college.
